embed_code_visible.detail: Embed code provided in outreach scripts — iframe HTML one-liner.

copy_paste_instructions_clear.detail: Simple iframe tag. One line, self-explanatory.

no_signup_no_personal_data_note.detail: Claim is true — no signup, client-side calculations, no data collection.

publisher_use_cases.detail: Landing page exists but use cases for publishers could be more explicit (e.g., 'Perfect for mortgage blogs, real estate agent sites, first-time buyer guides').

contact_response_cta.detail: Contact page at /contact. Qasem's email available.

page_speed_http200.detail: HTTP 200, prerendered by Next.js, fast load.

internal_links_from_relevant_pages.detail: Widgets page linked from footer. No prominent internal links from calculator pages or blog posts promoting the embed. Internal linking to embed page is weak.

pages_audited.name: Debt Snowball vs Avalanche Widget Landing Page

publisher_use_cases.detail: Same as mortgage — use cases could be more explicit.

internal_links_from_relevant_pages.detail: Weak internal linking to embed landing pages.

warnings: Publisher use cases not explicit on landing pages
Weak internal linking from relevant pages to widget embed pages
Embed iframes show full site footer/consent (not minimal)
fix_priority: Warnings only — no critical blockers. Outreach may proceed.
